title: US and Iranian militaries trade shots as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate — Day 66
snippet: Day 66 of the Iran war saw the first direct military exchange between US and Iranian forces since the April 8 ceasefire as Project Freedom launched. CENTCOM chief Adm. Bradley Cooper confirmed US forces destroyed 6 Iranian small boats in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran launched multiple cruise missiles, drones and small boats at US Navy ships and commercial vessels. Iran's state media claimed 2 missiles struck a US frigate, which CENTCOM categorically denied: 'No U.S. Navy ships have been struck.' 2 US-flagged merchant vessels successfully transited through the strait. Trump warned Iranian forces would be 'blown off the face of the Earth' if they target US ships. Hapag-Lloyd said transit through the strait was still not possible.
tag_reason: First direct US-Iran military exchange since April 8 ceasefire. Project Freedom Day 1 operations with live fire.
